# Task 21: Transition Shim Deprecation Markers Evidence
# Date: 2026-03-31
# Generated by: grep -r "@deprecated" in src/

=== Deprecation Markers Added ===

1. bootstrapApp() in src/bootstrap/app-bootstrap.ts
   Line 39: * @deprecated Transitional shim while bootstrap callers migrate to createAppHost().

2. AppClientRuntime type in src/terminal-cli/app-client-runtime.ts
   Line 8: * @deprecated Use `createAppHost()` directly instead. This bridge type exists

3. createAppClientRuntime() in src/terminal-cli/app-client-runtime.ts
   Line 19: * @deprecated Use `createAppHost()` instead. This factory remains available for

4. AppClients type alias in src/app/clients/app-clients.ts
   Line 23: /** @deprecated Use AppUserFacade */

5. AppBootstrapResult in src/bootstrap/types.ts
   Line 124-126: /**
    * @deprecated Use `AppHost` instead. This type remains available for backward
    * compatibility while callers migrate to the `AppHost` API.
    */

=== Build Verification ===
$ bun run build
$ tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
Exit code: 0 (PASS)

=== Summary ===
All 5 target items now have @deprecated JSDoc markers with migration paths.
Items remain functional for backward compatibility — no deletions made.
